restriction.android:title: Allowed Authentication Methods
restriction.android:description: Restrict which authentication methods employees may use.

restriction.android:title: Enable QR Code Relay
restriction.android:description: Allow QR code relay for contact exchange.

restriction.android:title: Minimum Gesture Similarity Threshold
restriction.android:description: Float 0.0–1.0. Higher = stricter gesture match required.

restriction.android:title: Audit Log Retention (days)
restriction.android:description: Number of days to retain exchange audit log entries.

restriction.android:title: Force Key Rotation (days)
restriction.android:description: Force identity key rotation after N days. 0 = disabled.
